detectors.description:
BeatKong.sendETHToFee(uint256) (BeatKong.sol#567-571) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (BeatKong.sol#569)
detectors.markdown:
[BeatKong.sendETHToFee(uint256)](BeatKong.sol#L567-L571) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BeatKong.openTrading() (BeatKong.sol#575-599):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (BeatKong.sol#585)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (BeatKong.sol#587)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (BeatKong.sol#587)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (BeatKong.sol#595)
	BeatKong.tradingOpen (BeatKong.sol#279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BeatKong.openTrading() (BeatKong.sol#575-599)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [BeatKong.openTrading()](BeatKong.sol#L575-L599):
	External calls:
	- [uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH())](BeatKong.sol#L585)
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](BeatKong.sol#L587)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](BeatKong.sol#L587)
	State variables written after the call(s):

	[BeatKong.tradingOpen](BeatKong.sol#L279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [BeatKong.openTrading()](BeatKong.sol#L575-L599)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BeatKong._transfer(address,address,uint256) (BeatKong.sol#441-505):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (BeatKong.sol#487)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (BeatKong.sol#519-531)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (BeatKong.sol#493)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (BeatKong.sol#569)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (BeatKong.sol#503)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (BeatKong.sol#655)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (BeatKong.sol#635)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (BeatKong.sol#637)
	BeatKong._rOwned (BeatKong.sol#237) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BeatKong._takeTeam(uint256) (BeatKong.sol#649-657)
	- BeatKong._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (BeatKong.sol#631-645)
	- BeatKong.balanceOf(address) (BeatKong.sol#359-363)
	- BeatKong.constructor() (BeatKong.sol#305-323)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (BeatKong.sol#503)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (BeatKong.sol#663)
	BeatKong._rTotal (BeatKong.sol#253) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BeatKong._getCurrentSupply() (BeatKong.sol#755-765)
	- BeatKong._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BeatKong.sol#661-667)
	- BeatKong.constructor() (BeatKong.sol#305-323)
	- BeatKong.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BeatKong.sol#415-423)

detectors.description:
Version constraint 0.8.13 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- StorageWriteRemovalBeforeConditionalTermination
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- InlineAssemblyMemorySideEffects
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation.
It is used by:
	- 0.8.13 (BeatKong.sol#17)
